violations.text: Establishment did not have a person in charge that has successfully completed an approved food safety manager certification course. Please email inspector proof that additional employees have been enrolled and completed an approved food safety course. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

A container of cream cheese was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Cream cheese container was observed stored above the fill line. Per person in charge, cream cheese had been in the prep unit for an unknown amount of time. Cream cheese was voluntarily disposed of (see attached disposal form). Establishment must not store food above the fill line. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2024

The presence of large and small flies are not controlled as evidenced by flies throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must schedule pest control services. Please email inspector proof of service. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The outside dumpster and recyclable dumpster are not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. The dumpster is in poor repair. Side door is removed. Dumpster must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The floors and walls throughout the facility, especially behind the ice machine and warewashing area, have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
